author: hollowstrawberry
description: Live audio player with queue/pause/play/skip/stop buttons for the audio cog. Stays at the bottom of the designated chat for as long as there are people listening and updates every 10 seconds.
install_msg:
🎶 __**AudioPlayer**__
:warning: **Important:** Discord doesn't like when things update periodically without human input, even when it follows ratelimits, so use this at your own risk. It *should* be fine conceptually as it requires humans to be listening in voice chat, but you never know. ```Cog installed. Instructions:
1. Load it with [p]load audioplayer
2. Enable in a server with [p]audioplayer channel [channel]```
short: Live audio player with buttons for the audio cog.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store user data.
